description: CompositionWhite and pink striped sleeveless top with a mock inner shirt, made of 100% cotton, has a tie-up at the back and graphic print with embroidery on the frontFittingComfortWash careWash separately with mild detergent Do not bleach Dry flat in shade Do not iron directly on print or embroidery Dry clean preferred Dress your little girl in utmost cute comfort in this striped top from ant. The tie-up bow and stripes lend it a girly vibe, while the fabric keeps her fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with skirts and floaters and watch her play in utmost comfort.
